mapper.select:
SELECT TBC.ID, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_NAME, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_TYPE, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_CREATE_AT, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_PROFILE, TBC.USER_ID, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_IS_DELETED, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_DETAIL, TBC.CHAT_ROOM_LIMIT, TBU.CHAT_ROOM_USERS FROM TBL_CHAT_ROOM TBC JOIN ( SELECT CHAT_ROOM_ID, COUNT(CHAT_ROOM_ID) AS CHAT_ROOM_USERS FROM TBL_CHAT_USER GROUP BY CHAT_ROOM_ID ) TBU ON TBC.ID = TBU.CHAT_ROOM_ID WHERE TBC.CHAT_ROOM_IS_DELETED = 0
AND (TBC.CHAT_ROOM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TBC.CHAT_ROOM_DETAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY TBC.ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT VCR.ID, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_NAME, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_DETAIL, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_TYPE, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_CREATE_AT, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_PROFILE, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_LIMIT, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_IS_DELETED, VCR.CHAT_ROOM_USERS, TCU.CHAT_START_AT, TCU.CHAT_LAST_READ_AT, TCU.USER_ID FROM VW_CHAT_ROOM VCR JOIN TBL_CHAT_USER TCU ON VCR.ID = TCU.CHAT_ROOM_ID WHERE TCU.USER_ID = #{userId} AND VCR.CHAT_ROOM_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY TCU.CHAT_LAST_READ_AT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_CHAT_ROOM (ID, CHAT_ROOM_NAME, CHAT_ROOM_TYPE, CHAT_ROOM_PROFILE, USER_ID, CHAT_ROOM_DETAIL, CHAT_ROOM_LIMIT) VALUES (#{id}, #{chatRoomName}, #{chatRoomType}, #{chatRoomProfile}, #{userId}, #{chatRoomDetail}, #{chatRoomLimit})
